dict.string: The camera is used for AR-based LiDAR depth capture to support navigation research and obstacle sensing.
Local network access is used to stream LiDAR depth frames to your laptop for processing.
Location is used for navigation assistance, placing hazard reports on the map, and summarizing nearby community hazards before you start walking.
The microphone is used when you speak a hazard description on the report screen.
Speech recognition converts what you say into text for hazard reports.
